scripts.dev: npm exec concurrently -- -n server,client,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix admin run dev"
scripts.dev:inventory: npm exec concurrently -- -n server,web -c blue,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix inventory-web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix admin run build && npm --prefix inventory-web run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix admin install && npm --prefix inventory-web install
